title: Droideka dispenser
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Ddroideka_dispenser.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Clone commando/Legends|Clone commando]] [[Boss (clone commando)/Legends|Boss]] encountering a Droideka dispenser.]]
A '''Droideka dispenser''' was a large roughly cylindrical box made of [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] that could both transport and dispense [[Droideka/Legends|droidekas]]. These units were used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] against [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] to continually dispense a supply of droidekas. The [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] of [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]] encountered many of these units.

==Behind the scenes==
Like the [[battle droid dispenser]], it is unclear whether the units actually had the capacity to produce an unlimited number of droids.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' {{1st}}
